resetSettings.title: Reset settings
resetSettings.message: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values? This cannot be undone.

deleteProvider.title: Delete Provider
deleteProvider.message:
Are you sure you want to delete provider "{{id}}"?

This will also delete:
- {{chatModels}} chat model(s)
- {{embeddingModels}} embedding model(s)

All embeddings generated using the associated embedding models will also be deleted.

deleteChatModel.title: Delete Chat Model
deleteChatModel.message: Are you sure you want to delete model "{{id}}"?
deleteChatModel.cannotRemoveSelected: Cannot remove model that is currently selected as Chat Model or Apply Model
deleteChatModel.cannotDisableSelected: Cannot disable model that is currently selected as Chat Model or Apply Model

deleteEmbeddingModel.title: Delete Embedding Model
deleteEmbeddingModel.message:
Are you sure you want to delete embedding model "{{id}}"?

This will also delete all embeddings generated using this model from the database.
deleteEmbeddingModel.cannotRemoveSelected: Cannot remove model that is currently selected as Embedding Model

deleteMcpServer.title: Delete MCP Server
deleteMcpServer.message: Are you sure you want to delete MCP server "{{name}}"?

deleteTemplate.title: Delete Template
deleteTemplate.message: Are you sure you want to delete template "{{name}}"?

kogcatIntro.title: KogCat
kogcatIntro.lead: KogCat reviews your thinking — it is not chat, and it is not a writing tool.
kogcatIntro.body: When you write a claim, KogCat checks it against your knowledge base and keeps only a few relevant calibration points that can improve the judgment.

points.local: Local first — reviewed text stays on this machine and is not uploaded to KogCat servers.
points.byoKey: BYO-key — use your own LLM key, a local model, or an offline preview.
points.clean: Clean uninstall — KogCat does not write proprietary syntax into your vault.

kogcatIntro.usageMain: select anything you wrote → press Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+C or right-click to review
kogcatIntro.usageSuffix: (command palette and the KogCat ribbon icon work too).
kogcatIntro.chatHistoryNote: Note: KogCat has moved from chat to a review pass. The old chat entry is no longer shown as the product surface.
kogcatIntro.providerNote: To refine reviews you need one model provider. Set one up to get started.

addProvider.title: Add Custom Provider
addProvider.idDesc: Choose an ID to identify this provider in your settings. This is just for your reference.
addProvider.baseUrlDesc: (leave blank if using default; OpenAI-compatible relay URLs usually end in /v1)
addProvider.modelsDesc: Enter the key / base URL above, then fetch the models this provider offers and pick the ones to use.
addProvider.modelsManualOnly: Enter the model name manually below.
addProvider.testNeedsModel: Choose or enter a model before testing.
addProvider.manualModelDesc: Use only when this provider cannot list models. This must be the exact model id sent to the provider API.
addProvider.manualModelFallbackDesc: Most providers should use Fetch models. Manual entry is only a fallback for Azure, local servers, or relays without a models endpoint.
addProvider.advancedSettingsDesc: Compatibility options for uncommon provider gateways.

addChatModel.title: Add Custom Chat Model
addChatModel.idDesc: Choose an ID to identify this model in your settings. This is just for your reference.
addChatModel.promptLevelDesc: Choose how complex the system prompt should be. Select "simple" for small models that ignore user questions and just repeat back instructions.

addEmbeddingModel.title: Add Custom Embedding Model
addEmbeddingModel.idDesc: Choose an ID to identify this model in your settings. This is just for your reference.
addEmbeddingModel.outputDimensionsDesc: Optional. Request a specific output dimension from models that support Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL), such as OpenAI's text-embedding-3-* or Google's gemini-embedding-001. Leave empty to use the model's default dimension.

performanceWarning.title: Performance Warning
performanceWarning.message:
This model outputs {{dimension}} dimensions, but the optimized dimensions for database indexing are: {{supported}}.

This may result in slower search performance.

Do you want to continue anyway?

errors.invalidResult: Embedding model returned an invalid result
errors.dimensionMismatch: Requested output dimension {{requested}}, but the model returned {{actual}} dimensions. This model may not support custom output dimensions (Matryoshka Representation Learning). Leave the "Output Dimensions" field empty to use the model's default dimension.

addMcpServer.name: Name
addMcpServer.nameDesc: The name of the MCP server
addMcpServer.parametersDesc:
JSON configuration that defines how to run the MCP server. Format must include:
- "command": The executable name (e.g., "npx", "node")
- "args": (Optional) Array of command-line arguments
- "env": (Optional) Key-value pairs of environment variables

errors.nameExists: Server with same name already exists

installerUpdateRequired.title: Kog Cat Requires Obsidian Update
installerUpdateRequired.message: Kog Cat requires a newer version of the Obsidian installer. Please note that this is different from Obsidian's in-app updates. You must manually download the latest version of Obsidian to continue using Kog Cat.

includedFiles.title: {{count}} Files Included
includedFiles.noPatterns: No inclusion patterns specified - all files will be included (except those matching exclusion patterns)
includedFiles.empty: No files match the inclusion patterns

excludedFiles.title: {{count}} Files Excluded
excludedFiles.empty: No files match the exclusion patterns

connectOpenAIPlan.title: Connect OpenAI subscription
connectOpenAIPlan.loginDesc: Login to OpenAI in your browser. Kog Cat connects automatically when you return.
connectOpenAIPlan.waitingBody: Complete the login in your browser, then return here
connectOpenAIPlan.fallbackDesc: Use this only if automatic connect fails. Paste the full redirect URL from your browser address bar.

steps.step2: Kog Cat connects automatically when you return
